intro: Click Italian brainrot animals, upgrade income!
description:
The goal of the game is to unlock all the characters and climb the rankings as high as possible. Become number one!

There are 28 characters in the game. Including:
- Burbaloni Luliloli
- Udin Din Din
- Bobrito Bandito
- Chimpani Banani
- Tralalero Tralala
- Tung Tung Tung Sahur
- Lirili Larila
- Ballarina Cappuccina
- Bombardiro Crocodilo
- Trippi Troppa
- Brr Brr Patapim
- Trulimero Trulichina

To unlock a new character, earn the required number of coins and level up. Unlock all the Italian Brainrot Animals!
